lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: I really hope the Professor finds those keys soon...

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Did the Professor ask you to look for the library keys? Let me know if you find them.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: You found the library keys! That's a huge relief, thank you.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: The Professor said you needed a Club Application Form for the Guard? Here you go, all stamped and approved.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Good luck with the Guard! He can be a bit strict.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Let me know if you need any forms or paperwork. I handle all of it for the Professor.
